summary: Task 035 is complete in substance. The homepage now renders one unified live search input on `/` via the client showroom component, filters the mixed published feed in place using `item.title` only, and continues to source data from published-note and published-link queries only. The active plan and public search spec match the shipped behavior, and the recorded `npm run verify` run passed.
satisfied_exit_criteria: Homepage exposes a single public search bar with no type selector.
Search filters published notes and published links together by title only.
Filtering is in-place on `/` and does not introduce a separate public results route.
Public data source remains limited to published content only.
Recorded `npm run verify` passed, including focused E2E coverage for public homepage search.
